2606.21689.title: Clinical Term Extraction using Open-Source Small Language Models
2606.21689.paper_summary: Clinical information for amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) care documented in unstructured clinical notes limits downstream analysis without extraction into structured formats. Open-source small language models with few-shot prompting for detecting the presence of ALS-relevant clinical terms in patient documentation were evaluated without task-specific training data. The detection task targeted 17 categories spanning functional scores, respiratory measures, medications, and related clinical and non-clinical attributes. Clinical note content was normalized from JSON-encoded discharge summaries and processed with a prompt template having structured JSON outputs. We compared 26 open-source models using aggregate, label-level, and manual-validation multilabel classification metrics. Manual validation showed that a regex rule baseline had higher overall micro-F1 and lower Hamming loss than any single SLM or TF-IDF baseline, while Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 was the highest-performing SLM by micro-F1. Model rankings varied by metric and label category, with the TF-IDF baseline showing high recall but low precision, some SLMs showing higher precision but lower recall, and Hammer2.1-7b showing strong performance for ALSFRS-R subscore detection. These findings support targeted hybrid extraction workflows rather than replacement of existing rule-based methods.
2606.21689.paper_summary_zh: 臨床信息在非結構化臨床筆記中記錄的肌萎縮側索硬化症（ALS）護理限制了後續分析，除非提取為結構化格式。開源的小型語言模型在沒有特定任務訓練數據的情況下，使用少量提示來檢測患者文檔中與ALS相關的臨床術語的存在。檢測任務針對17個類別，涵蓋功能評分、呼吸測量、藥物以及相關的臨床和非臨床屬性。臨床筆記內容從JSON編碼的出院摘要中進行標準化，並使用具有結構化JSON輸出的提示模板進行處理。我們使用聚合、標籤級別和手動驗證的多標籤分類指標比較了26個開源模型。手動驗證顯示，正則表達式規則基準的整體微F1較高，而漢明損失較低，優於任何單一的SLM或TF-IDF基準，而Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507則是微F1表現最佳的SLM。模型排名根據指標和標籤類別而異，TF-IDF基準顯示高召回率但低精確度，一些SLM顯示較高的精確度但較低的召回率，而Hammer2.1-7b在ALSFRS-R子分數檢測中表現強勁。這些發現支持針對性的混合提取工作流程，而不是取代現有的基於規則的方法。
2606.21689.author: Noah Marchal et.al.
2606.21689.authors: Noah Marchal, William E. Janes, Mihail Popescu, Xing Song
